name: codex
title: Codex
description: Unofficial Raycast control surface for starting, searching, and managing local Codex threads.
author: asifk

commands.name: search-threads
commands.title: Search Threads
commands.subtitle: Codex
commands.description: Search, resume, rename, summarize, archive, fork, and export Codex threads.

commands.name: new-thread-with-prompt
commands.title: New Thread with Prompt
commands.subtitle: Codex
commands.description: Start a new Codex thread with an initial prompt.

commands.name: new-thread-from-clipboard
commands.title: New Thread from Clipboard
commands.subtitle: Codex
commands.description: Start a new Codex thread using clipboard text as the initial prompt.

preferences.name: defaultProjectDirectory
preferences.title: Default Project Directory
preferences.description: Optional existing local workspace directory to use when starting new Codex threads.

preferences.name: projectsDirectory
preferences.title: Projects Folder
preferences.description: Optional parent folder to offer project choices when starting a Codex thread with a prompt.

preferences.name: codexCliPath
preferences.title: Codex CLI Path
preferences.description: Optional absolute path to the Codex CLI. Leave empty to auto-detect.
